description: Append-only realized outcome log for previously registered prospective forecasts, with explicit references back to the frozen registration artifact and evidence source.

required_fields.name: schema_version
required_fields.description: Prospective forecast outcome log schema version.

required_fields.name: outcome_log_id
required_fields.description: Stable identifier for the append-only outcome log file.

required_fields.name: logged_at
required_fields.description: ISO datetime recording when this outcome log file was written.

required_fields.name: logged_by
required_fields.description: Human or process label that logged the realized outcomes.

required_fields.name: outcome_records
required_fields.description: Observed outcomes for previously registered forecasts, each referencing the immutable registration artifact and evidence file.

optional_fields.name: notes
optional_fields.description: Optional notes about the outcome logging batch.
